title: EVO Pink Move & Groove Scooter | Kids 3-Wheel Scooter Perfect For Boys & Girls
description: Product Description The EVO Move 'n' Groove scooter provides an innovative steering system - just lean & steer to move n groove! Encourages the development of balance and coordination. This scooter includes many features including 608zz bearings, PVC wheels, soft grip EVA handles, rear brake, 65cm in height and a removable handlebar for easy storage and transportation. Suitable for ages 3 years and above. Box Contains 1 x scooter
